name: PM MUDRA Yojana
full_name: Pradhan Mantri Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency
benefit: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh for small businesses
benefit_hindi: Chhote karobaar ke liye bina guarantee ke ₹10 lakh tak loan

eligibility.description: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farming income-generating activity
eligibility.description_hindi: Koi bhi Bharatiya naagrik jo chhota business shuru karna chahta hai ya badhana chahta hai
criteria: Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,001-₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5-10 lakh)
exclusions: Agricultural activities (use Kisan Credit Card instead)

steps: Visit any bank, NBFC, or MFI
steps_hindi: Category chunein: Shishu (50 hazaar tak), Kishore (5 lakh tak), Tarun (10 lakh tak)
Koi guarantee ya zabta nahi chahiye
7-10 din mein loan mil jaata hai

hindi_summary: MUDRA Yojana mein chhota business shuru karne ke liye bina guarantee ke loan milta hai. Teen category hain — Shishu: 50 hazaar tak, Kishore: 5 lakh tak, Tarun: 10 lakh tak. Kisi bhi bank mein jaake apply kar sakte hain. Koi zameen ya sona girvi nahi rakhna padta.
